Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Dr Graves Records Pursuant To Subpoena Duces Tecum
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Peter Galessner, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party: Edward C. Randleston
No appearance by Plaintiff's counsel
Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant Edward C. Randleston's Motion To Compel Production Of Dr. Graves' Records Pursuant To Subpoena Duces Tecum is denied. C.R.C. 3.1025 requires that "a written notice and all moving papers supporting motion to compel ... production of a document of tangible thing from a nonparty deponent shall be personally served on the nonparty deponent unless the nonparty deponent agrees to accept service by mail at an address specified on the deposition record." This motion was not personally served upon the third party deponent. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
